name: thermal-dynamic
description: Thermal and dynamic boundary conditions cover temperature/heat-transfer values, acceleration inputs, and quiet boundaries for dynamic wave absorption.

notes: Use temperature for prescribed temperature boundaries.
Use flux or convection for heat-transfer style boundaries.
FLAC2D users should avoid z-directed acceleration keywords; quiet normal/tangential forms are dimension-neutral.

common_patterns.name: Quiet base boundary
commands: zone face apply quiet-normal range group 'Bottom'

common_patterns.name: Prescribed temperature
commands: zone face apply temperature 20 range group 'Outer'
